name: /review legacy shim forwarding records the migration in the user warnings log for visibility
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review.sh" --dry-run 2>err.txt && grep -q 'event=command-deprecation' .claude-tdd-pro/warnings.jsonl && grep -q 'old=/review' .claude-tdd-pro/warnings.jsonl && grep -q 'new=/review-panel' .claude-tdd-pro/warnings.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
